1. Intialize the zonelet yaml in MON-AZ1
# gt -Z <path>/zonelet.yml

2. Set Variable on deployer
# LOCAL_NODE="mon3-qz1-sr3-rk171-s10-sn1,mon3-qz1-sr3-rk171-s10-sn2";RNODE="mon3-qz1-sr3-rk168-s06-sn2";SG1="089249f5-51a9-49af-84f6-56b1bd1e8876";PORT="7c44b8e9-8ac8-4eb4-959f-5d8911f49dff"

# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"

4. MITIGATION:

5. RE-VALIDATE
